title: 🎶 OSSFEST 2026 – NORTH STAGE 🎶
excerpt:
🎶 OSSFEST 2026 – NORTH STAGE 🎶

Saturday, July 25, The North Stage stitched By Sam & The Painted Lady Posse with Love, comes alive with a full day of incredible live music as OSSFEST returns to celebrate Toronto's independent music community.

From emerging local favourites to legendary Canadian icons, this year's lineup delivers a full spectrum of sounds across ten straight hours of live performances. Settle in for an afternoon and evening packed with rock, indie, folk, alternative, and everything in between.

Line up

2PM • Emma Campbell
3PM • Reposadists
4PM • Kunle
5PM • The Violet Archers
6PM • David B. Archibald
7PM • Brainfudge
8PM • Carole Pope
9PM • Blame Betty
10PM • Active Mirror

title: Tape and Tears with Twinta, Quiver the Busker
excerpt:
Come see a night of folk punk at the Painted Lady featuring traveling Wisconsin folk-punk acts Quiver the Busker and duo Tape and Tears as they join local hypno folk punk band Twintwa for one night only on July 24th!

6:30pm | $15

title: TRAUMAQUEEN  debut single release party
excerpt:
Here’s a shorter elevator pitch:

TRAUMAQUEEN is a Canadian rock band from Toronto and Barrie, blending soaring vocals, killer guitar riffs, and classic rock swagger with a fresh modern edge. Inspired by icons like Aerosmith, Heart, and Van Halen, they deliver catchy, high-voltage songs with bite — and a live show that leaves you buzzing. Their debut single, “Heard of You,” drops July 17 everywhere.

title: VIVA LAS LUXXXY
excerpt:
The Viva Las Luxxy show via a pop-up LATE night Launch party!

Come dress up, drink and party with some of the first cast and crew members, see some fun bartop burlesque, and if you misbehave the right amount we’ll show you some magic by @gambitmagician 😏😏😏

10PM | PWYW
